candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Below are two flight paths that the crow could assume when eating whelks. Select the flight path that would be used most often and the response that best supports your answer.
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: Flight Path A: the crow has a wider view of his surroundings to assure that another bird will not steal the whelk
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
雷多·扎克(Reto Zach)研究了西北乌鸦(Northwestern Crow)的鞭打行为。以下是乌鸦在捕食时可能采取的两条飞行路径:

$$\begin{array}{l}
\text{路径1:}&\vec{r}_1(t)=\langle 2t,3t,4t\rangle\\
\text{路径2:}&\vec{r}_2(t)=\langle 3\cos(t),3\sin(t),2t\rangle
\end{array}$$

其中$\vec{r}_1(t)$和$\vec{r}_2(t)$分别表示路径1和路径2在时刻$t$时乌鸦的位置矢量。请选择乌鸦最经常使用的飞行路径,并给出支持您答案的理由。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The prompt clearly asks for a choice between two labeled flight paths and a supporting reason. The image is simple but legible enough to distinguish Flight Path A from B, so the text-image pair is understandable, even though the supporting rationale is only weakly grounded visually.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
